name: Summer Circus Spectacular
venue: Historic Asolo Theater at The Ringling
hours_label: Tue-Fri 11 AM & 2 PM, Sat 2 PM & 5 PM · $20 adults / $15 kids 15 & under
blurb: The Ringling and The Circus Arts Conservatory team up for a fast-paced, family-friendly big-top show inside the air-conditioned Historic Asolo Theater. Acrobats, jugglers and clowns pack an hour of jaw-dropping fun. Add the Circus Museum the same day for just $5 more.

name: The Last Romance
blurb: Florida Studio Theatre's summer mainstage comedy follows an aging widower whose chance encounter at a dog park sparks an unexpected late-in-life romance. Warm, funny and heartfelt, it's an easy night out in the heart of downtown's arts district. Check FST for showtimes and tickets.

name: Sarasota Farmers Market
blurb: Downtown Sarasota's Saturday tradition fills Lemon Avenue and Main Street with local produce, seafood, flowers, baked goods and prepared foods. It's free to browse and a favorite weekend ritual for residents and visitors alike. Come early for the best selection and parking.

name: Siesta Key Drum Circle
blurb: Every Sunday, drummers, dancers and onlookers gather on the powdery quartz sand of Siesta Beach for a free, come-as-you-are drum circle. The rhythm builds as the sun drops toward the Gulf. Bring a chair, a drum or just yourself and enjoy one of the Key's most beloved traditions.
